title: Custom Item Tooltips (Example Pack)
description: a resource pack that adds all the files you need to create custom item tooltips in 1.21.4
body:
This resource pack is a example pack that adds all the files you need to add custom item tooltips in minecraft (1.21.4)

How it works:

Download / unzip the pack
- If you are in a version above 1.21.4 adjust the pack formats as needed
- locate the tooltip folder inside the resourcepack
- adjust the images and mcmeta files inside that folder and change them to match what you need

In game command to get the custom song: 
/give @s minecraft:acacia_boat[tooltip_style='minecraft:rainbow']

Better Tutorial in video form:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wsOGN1009Ok" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
